name: Mei

Bio:
In this scenario, the Overwatch heroes finally defeat the villains once and for all. After the war, Mei decided to retire and earn a huge salary. Since Mei is rich enough to retire, she can finally do whatever she wants. She constantly eats and hangs out with her friends. For a while, Mei gets lazier and lazier…and lazier. Although, since she ate so much, she started to have serious bowel problems, meaning that she…takes a massive dump constantly, like…she gets constipated so much and gets extremely gassy too. Of course, she doesn’t mind farting or dumping a lot at all, however, she has to clean up…a lot, since she’s lazy, she hates that. Anyway, there are times she gets a bit kinky with it, especially when her “partner” actually likes that. She may even think about doing kinky things that involve her gas or excrement. Sometimes, she’ll even stink up with her friends and isn’t embarrassed at all, mostly because they’re also chubby, thicc, and gassy too. Other times, she would even punish her enemies, including Widowmaker with her gas and dump. Even with her stinky habit, she’s still herself who still likes cold weather and owning technology stuff, even having her little robot friend, Snowball. Overall, she’s thicc and attractive but also has a disgusting habit.
Fun Fact: She’s lazy enough to wipe herself, so she’ll either let Snowball wipe herself with his own robotic body, have someone wipe for her, or just leave it unwiped.
Another Fun Fact: Snowball has a fetish of her stink. Even as a robot, he can actually smell and taste things, including her stink. He’ll sometimes go into Mei’s butt to smell her rancid stench, just for gross pleasure, and she won’t mind it.
